defaults.negative: cartoon, illustration, 3d render, cgi, painting, deformed, disfigured, extra limbs, extra fingers, mutated hands, bad anatomy, watermark, text, logo, low quality, blurry, jpeg artifacts, oversaturated, harsh shadows

characters.aria: a 28 year old woman, oval face, light olive skin, shoulder-length dark brown wavy hair, subtle natural makeup, calm friendly expression, wearing a plain heather-grey crew-neck t-shirt and slim dark charcoal trousers, minimal neutral wardrobe
characters.leo: a 30 year old man, short dark hair, light stubble, neutral relaxed expression, wearing a plain slate-grey t-shirt and dark trousers, minimal neutral wardrobe

styles.studio_cutout: full body head-to-toe, standing, isolated on a seamless pure white studio background, high-key evenly lit white backdrop, subject clearly separated from the background, soft three-point softbox lighting, sharp focus, shot on 50mm f8, photorealistic, natural skin texture, high detail
styles.portrait_light: upper body portrait, plain dark neutral studio background, photorealistic, natural skin texture, shot on 85mm f2, high detail

_nota: As poses do Retrato passaram a usar o manequim vetorial (js/pages/photo-mannequin.js), não imagens IA. Aqui ficam só exemplos que beneficiam de rosto real (qualidade da luz).

assets.prompt: lit by soft frontal light, even flat illumination on the face, minimal shadows, catchlights centered in the eyes
assets.caption: Luz frontal / suave

assets.prompt: lit by dramatic side light from the left, strong light-and-shadow across the face, sculpting the cheekbone, loop/Rembrandt lighting
